commonParams.background: dark wood or charcoal surface, moody atmosphere
commonParams.lighting: warm directional light, dramatic shadows, amber tones
commonParams.avoid: no white backgrounds, no bright daylight, no pastels

hero-burger.prompt: Professional food photography of a towering gourmet cheeseburger with melted cheddar, crispy bacon, lettuce, and tomato on a toasted brioche bun, dark wooden surface, warm dramatic lighting from left, shallow depth of field, steam rising, appetizing and rustic

wings-plate.prompt: Professional food photography of crispy chicken wings glazed with orange buffalo sauce on a dark slate plate, blue cheese dip in a small ramekin, celery sticks, dark wooden table, warm lighting, appetizing

cocktail.prompt: Professional food photography of a craft whiskey cocktail in a crystal rocks glass with a large ice cube and orange peel, dark bar counter, warm amber lighting, shallow depth of field, sophisticated

bar-interior.prompt: Professional interior photography of a dark industrial bar interior with exposed brick walls, wood bar counter lined with bottles, warm amber pendant lights, leather bar stools, atmospheric and moody, no people

fries-plate.prompt: Professional food photography of golden crispy french fries in a metal basket, ketchup and aioli dipping sauces in small bowls, dark wooden table, warm lighting, rustic gastropub style

steak.prompt: Professional food photography of a perfectly grilled ribeye steak with visible grill marks, rosemary sprig, flaky sea salt, dark slate plate, warm directional lighting, appetizing and premium, shallow depth of field
